# Usage Example:

**Query with Page and Entity:**
> Use blazor-list-form-generator skill to implement create/add and edit/modify operation handlers with popup/modal dialogs and Playwright UI tests for the Request list page.
**带页面和实体的提问：**
> 使用 blazor-list-form-generator skill，为 Request 列表页面实现创建/添加和编辑/修改操作处理程序，包含弹出模态对话框和 Playwright UI 测试。
